{{Quote|We're all dying. Promise yourselves you'll be the last to go!|Salvo|<ref name="TRoDV" />}}
'''Salvo''' was a [[Clone Commander/Legends|clone trooper commander]] that served under [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Roan Shryne]] as leader of the [[32nd Air Combat Wing]] during the [[Battle of Murkhana (Clone Wars)|Battle of Murkhana]]. His shrapnel-pitted armor featured the rust-brown markings of an unknown division.

As was common with [[Clone trooper/Legends|clones]] of his stature, Salvo wore a command [[Kama/Legends|''kama'']] similar to those worn by the [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|Advanced Recon Commandos]]. He also carried a pair of [[DC-17 hand blaster/Legends|DC-17 hand blasters]] and had the motto "Live to serve!" etched into the side of his armored helmet.

==Biography==
When [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] was issued from [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], Salvo ordered the [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]] of [[Ion Team|Ion Squad]] to ambush Shryne and the three [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] that the commando squad had accompanied on an infiltration mission. Ion's leader, a commando named [[Climber (clone)|Climber]], refused his command, disbelieving its authenticity, and Ion Team set a counter-ambush for Salvo and his men as they lay in wait for the Jedi. Though non-lethal, Ion's disruptive ambush rendered the standard clones unable to prevent the Jedi from escaping. Salvo, furious at Climber's [[Treason/Legends|treasonous]] actions, reported him to his superiors. Nevertheless, members of his [[22nd Air Combat Wing|22nd]] [[Company/Legends|Company]] did manage to successfully ambush and kill several other Jedi on Murkhana who were not as fortunate as those accompanied by Ion Team.

When [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], the Emperor's newest enforcer, and [[501st Legion/Legends|his]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] arrived on [[Murkhana/Legends|Murkhana]] in search of the escaped Jedi, Vader had Salvo and his men round up the displaced citizens of [[Murkhana City/Legends|Murkhana City]] and ordered them into slavery. When Salvo, still unsure of just exactly who and what Vader was, presented him with the bodies and lightsabers of the slain Jedi, Vader told him to "dispose of them in any fashion you see fit."
